mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHECKIN_RECORDS ( CHECKIN_ID, USER_ID, CHECKIN_TYPE, CHECKIN_DATE, RECORD_TIME, POINTS_EARNED, STREAK_DAYS, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{checkinId}, #{userId}, #{checkinType}, #{checkinDate}, #{recordTime}, #{pointsEarned}, #{streakDays}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, USER_ID AS userId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, RECORD_TIME AS recordTime, POINTS_EARNED AS pointsEarned, STREAK_DAYS AS streakDays FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY CHECKIN_DATE, RECORD_TIME
SELECT CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, POINTS_EARNED AS pointsEarned FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkinDate} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(POINTS_EARNED), 0) FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT DISTINCT CHECKIN_DATE FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY CHECKIN_DATE DESC

SELECT CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, POINTS_EARNED AS pointsEarned, STREAK_DAYS AS streakDays FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CHECKIN_DATE >= #{startDate} ORDER BY CHECKIN_DATE DESC, RECORD_TIME DESC LIMIT 50
